examples: The writer is guilty of bias and inaccuracy.
He was disturbed by the inaccuracy of the answers.
The report has been rejected by the authorities, who said much of it was based on supposition or inaccuracy.
He said on occasions reporting on public spending on Gaelic degenerated into inaccuracy, prejudice and mockery.
But Mr Bodanis's style is not for everyone, and one man's poetry is another man's inaccuracy.
